message:
fix(mux): filter gitignored files during upload and gate benchmark counters

- Make loadGitignore public so upload handler can call it
- Add gitignore exclusion check in handleFileData for uploads
  (excluded files are ACK'd but not written to disk)
- Gate all bandwidth benchmark counters behind -Dbenchmark build flag
  so they compile to zero-cost when not benchmarking
- Add API callback infrastructure to http_server for /api/* endpoints
